about.label: The Developer
about.title: Engineering
about.intro1: I am Jônatas Nascimento, 19 years old from Extrema - MG, fully focused on global operations and challenges.
about.intro2: I don't just write code; I build resilient applications. I navigate naturally from root infrastructure (operating Linux/Docker environments via SSH) to Research & Development (R&D), creating advanced AI integrations with Function Calling and Chatbots. I work as a Mid-Level Full-Stack Developer, but the complexity of my deliverables and the architectures I lead reflect Senior-level expertise.
about.stackText: The core of my engineering is PHP with the modern Laravel ecosystem. Although I master React on the front-end for interactive interfaces, I have a strong technical preference for using Blade or Livewire. An architectural decision to ensure absolute cohesion, extreme delivery speed, and optimized performance.
about.timelineSubtitle: Great architectures aren't built overnight; they are forged under pressure. This is my background's evolution:

timeline.title: The Forging (McDonald's)
timeline.desc: Where I learned relentless execution under pressure, strict SLAs, and pure resilience. The unofficial SRE training.

timeline.title: The Base (SENAC)
timeline.desc: Technical course focusing on web systems fundamentals and full-stack architecture.

timeline.title: End-to-End Architect (Freelancer)
timeline.desc: Architect and Engineer responsible for platforms like Cafeteria Damore and JYNSGE News, orchestrating infrastructure and complex integrations.

timeline.title: Tech Lead & Architect (LUMEN Consultoria)
timeline.desc: Built the Lumen Platform (B2G SaaS) from scratch. Implemented Laravel Octane, autonomous AI R&D, and resolved complex legacy Race Conditions.

timeline.title: The Anchor (UNIVESP)
timeline.desc: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Engineering, diving into deep layers and low-level architectures.

skills.label: Technologies
skills.title: Technical
skills.desc: Prioritized toolkit for %mode%. Items are dynamically reordered based on the active dimension.

description.fullstack: High-performance Enterprise B2G SaaS powered by Laravel Octane, handling complex public procurement workflows with in-memory state and zero latency.
description.backend: High-performance architecture with Laravel Octane and FrankenPHP, drastically reducing boot times for heavy requests.
description.frontend: Dynamic content blocks with Alpine.js and granular JSON Schemas generated by AI.
description.ai: Granular AI generation where legal document sections are independent, editable blocks with regeneration capability.
description.devops: CI/CD pipeline with dedicated Queue Workers for AI processing, preventing timeouts via front-end polling.

description.fullstack: Advanced virtual assistant driven by AI and native RAG, capable of querying complex legal contexts and analyzing proprietary files via real-time Vector Search.
description.backend: Migration to OpenAI Assistants API for native File Search and high-precision document indexing.
description.frontend: Real-time UX with React 19 and Server-Sent Events (SSE) to eliminate loading states using the useStream hook.
description.ai: Engineering custom Function Calling (Tools) allowing the LLM to query the SQL database in real-time.
description.devops: Monetization and token-gating logic that tracks AI consumption and blocks requests when quotas are exhausted.

description.fullstack: Automated pipeline that reduced public document generation from months to minutes using asynchronous background queues and heavy processing workflows.
description.backend: High-performance SPA backend with Laravel 11 and asynchronous queues handling heavy background loads.
description.frontend: Responsive administrative dashboard with React (Inertia.js), user management, and metrics visualization.
description.ai: Implementation of strict JSON Schemas to prevent 'hallucinations' in technical documents (ETP, DFD, Risk Matrices).
description.devops: Full server configuration (Linux/Nginx) from scratch and automated CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions.

description.fullstack: Deep refactoring of a legacy government system, eliminating critical Race Conditions and stabilizing an obsolete state-machine architecture with RxJS.
description.backend: Resolved complex Race Conditions in a Document Chat module using RxJS Observables and reactive patterns.
description.frontend: Refactor of monolithic TypeScript files and fixing legacy browser responsive layout bugs.
description.ai: Deep-dive technical audit (150+ hours) demonstrating stack financial unsustainability via ROI and TCO metrics.
description.devops: Architecture design for transition to Single-Tenant Docker/Kubernetes with 2FA and law-required Audit Logs.

description.fullstack: Semantic structuring implementation with advanced responsive layouts, applying modern CSS Grid and Flexbox techniques for true-to-design fidelity.
description.frontend: Practical implementation of Flexbox and Grid layouts optimized for cross-browser compatibility.
description.ai: Automated deployment integrated with GitHub for instant public visualization of the project.

description.fullstack: Pure JS interactive narrative engine, mutating the DOM in real-time based on complex player decisions and branching story states dynamically.
description.backend: Pure JS state management logic handling narrative branching and player choices.
description.frontend: Minimalist, immersive interface with dynamic scene updates through DOM manipulation.
description.ai: Branched storytelling allowing multiple player experiences based on decision-making profiles.

description.fullstack: Autonomous AI engine enforcing strict JSON Schemas to generate highly complex, hallcuniation-free structured government contracts dynamically.
End-to-end digital storefront platform focused on responsive UX, seamless menu integration, and robust operational tooling for local business.
Highly-optimized full-stack news portal designed with a flexible architecture to rapidly deliver Server-Side Rendered content globally.

items.title: AI Engineering

items.title: Legacy Rescue
items.desc: Audit, refactor, and stabilization of critical systems with high technical debt.

items.title: DevOps Strategy
items.desc: Agile CI/CD, server provisioning, and asynchronous workers for global scale.
